name: 3rd Shot Pickleball Wheat Ridge
description: Come play pickleball at 3rd Shot Pickleball Wheat Ridge in Wheat Ridge, CO! There are 13 indoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like food, water, restrooms, lights, wheelchair accessibility, and trainers or lessons. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved.

name: Addenbrooke Park
description: Nets can be found in the lockbox on the courts.  The lockbox code is 1555

name: Apel-Bacher Park
description: Apel-Bacher Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wheat Ridge, CO. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Apex Center
description: Apex Center is a place to play pickleball in Arvada, CO. There are 5 indoor acrylic and wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Apex Secrest Recreation Center
description: Great place for drop in pickleball. Intermediate to intermediate-advanced.

name: Apex Simms Street Rec Center
description:
Outdoor Pickleball courts are only Free from November 1st, to March 31st. 
Reservations can be made from April 1st to October 31st.
As per Apex website.

name: Arvada Church Of God
description: Come play pickleball at Arvada Church Of God in Arvada, CO! There is 1 indoor concrete court. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The court is private. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Carmody Rec Center
description: Carmody Rec Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lakewood, CO. There are 9 hard courts. 3 are indoors and 6 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, lights, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Carmody Recreation Center
description: Great place to gather and play Pickleball. Groups and singles. Players are responsive to others coming in and tend to find spots for them to rotate into a game. Covered tables with benches.

name: Charles Whitlock Park
description: The outdoor courts are permanently closed.

name: Charles Whitlock Recreation Center

The courts cannot be reserved. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Clear Creek Valley Park
description: Come play pickleball at Clear Creek Valley Park in Arvada, CO! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights. Reservations are available. The courts are free.

name: Denver Racquets Club
description: 2 Indoor Permanent Pickleball courts located at Meadow Creek East at 679 Sheridan Blvd. Members and Guests welcome!

name: Evergreen High School
description: Come play pickleball at Evergreen High School in Evergreen, CO! There are 6 courts. 4 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Evergreen Middle School
description: Evergreen Middle School is a place to play pickleball in Evergreen, CO. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
